0.text: Diffuse mild ectasia of the bronchial structures

1.text: Diffuse minimal increase in peribronchial thickness in both lungs

2.text: Area of increased density consistent with linear atelectasis in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Emphysematous changes more evident in the upper lobes of both lungs

4.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
